headline: ASML Could Swing 7.5% After Earnings on Wednesday
summary: Earnings for ASML, Progressive, and BNY Mellon are coming with implied moves of 3.89%, 3.89%, and 4.14% respectively, reflecting market expectations for post-print repricing risk.
